title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: NetworkManager-libreswan bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for NetworkManager-libreswan is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: This package contains software for integrating the libreswan VPN software with NetworkManager and the GNOME desktopBug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Failure to import libreswan connection with rsa keys ending in '==' [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-127865)  NM fails to apply ipsec connection: duplicate key 'phase2alg' [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-131232)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
full_text:
An update for NetworkManager-libreswan is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

This package contains software for integrating the libreswan VPN software with NetworkManager and the GNOME desktopBug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Failure to import libreswan connection with rsa keys ending in '==' [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-127865)  NM fails to apply ipsec connection: duplicate key 'phase2alg' [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-131232)
